Module com.example.miniproyectosudoku6x6
Package com.example.miniproyectosudoku6x6.model

Class ProveedorAyuda.Sugerencia

java.lang.Object
com.example.miniproyectosudoku6x6.model.ProveedorAyuda.Sugerencia
Enclosing class:
ProveedorAyuda
public static class ProveedorAyuda.Sugerencia extends Object
Immutable value object that represents a single hint suggestion.

Carries the coordinates of the cell where the hint applies and the value that should be placed in it.

  • Field Summary

    private final int
    columna
    Column index of the suggested cell.

    private final int
    valor
    Suggested value (between 1 and 6).

  • Constructor Details

    • Sugerencia

      public Sugerencia(int fila, int columna, int valor)
      Creates a new immutable hint.
      Parameters:
      fila - the row of the suggested cell
      columna - the column of the suggested cell
      valor - the suggested value

  • Method Details

    • obtenerFila

      public int obtenerFila()
      Returns the row index of the suggested cell.
      Returns:
      the row index (0-5)

    • obtenerColumna

      public int obtenerColumna()
      Returns the column index of the suggested cell.
      Returns:
      the column index (0-5)

    • obtenerValor

      public int obtenerValor()
      Returns the suggested value.
      Returns:
      the value (1-6)
